question.label: Feedback changed what
question.name: What changed in your work after the last round of feedback?
question.description: Checks whether prior feedback translated into behavior, not just agreement.

answer: When reviews are broad, I am not sure what to change first.

assessment.note: He says broad feedback leaves him unsure what to change first — strong growth blockage with a clear clarity problem.

new_queue.label: Broad reviews gap
new_queue.name: When reviews are broad, what guidance is missing most for you?

new_queue.label: Work slowing you down
new_queue.name: What part of your growth feels most blocked right now?

new_queue.label: Next step agreement
new_queue.name: What should we agree you will do before we next meet?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 5)

history.answer_excerpt: I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.
I sometimes focus on polish and lose sight of the core message.
I want clearer examples of what excellent junior-level work looks like here.
When reviews are broad, I am not sure what to change first.
